description_long: This is a large, single-story modern house with a sprawling, rectangular footprint and a flat, multi-tiered roof. The exterior is surrounded by a low boundary wall and features landscaped areas with palm trees and shrubs, giving it a contemporary suburban feel. The house has multiple large windows and sliding glass doors, providing ample natural light and a strong connection to the outdoor spaces. The main entryway is accentuated by a covered porch and a pathway leading up to it, while the rear side includes a spacious patio area, likely for recreation or gatherings. The facade is finished in neutral tones, with a mix of smooth concrete, glass, and metal elements. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a harmonious integration with the surrounding landscape.
description: A large, modern single-story house with a flat, multi-level roof, expansive windows, and landscaped surroundings. The design features clean lines, neutral colors, and a blend of concrete, glass, and metal.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, landscaped garden, and a covered porch with palm trees lining the boundary.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long facade, multiple windows, and a mix of greenery along the perimeter wall.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a spacious patio area, additional greenery, and large sliding glass doors opening to the backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the patio, more palm trees, and the extended flat roof sections.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a covered porch, wide steps, and a minimalist door framed by landscaping and a pathway
